title: How to Decipher a Program Solicitation: NSF Build and Broaden
display_label: How to Decipher NSF Build and Broaden Solicitation (PDF)
content: Marked-up walkthrough of the NSF Build and Broaden 2.0 solicitation. Distributed by ORA as a companion resource to Tracy Rone's 2023-02-27 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Strategies for Grant Proposal Development'. Demonstrates how to parse a federal solicitation, identify evaluation criteria, and align proposal narrative to reviewer expectations.
